ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.13.* *_cp313
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
A Python module to parse, validate and reformat standard numbers and codes in different formats. It contains a large collection of number formats.
Basically any number or code that has some validation mechanism available or some common formatting is eligible for inclusion in this library.
about.summary: A Python module to parse, validate and reformat standard numbers and codes in different formats.

about.description:
A Python module to parse, validate and reformat standard numbers and codes in different formats. It contains a large collection of number formats.
Basically any number or code that has some validation mechanism available or some common formatting is eligible for inclusion in this library.
about.summary: A Python module to parse, validate and reformat standard numbers and codes in different formats.

name: python-stdnum
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "python-stdnum" %}
{% set version = "2.2" %}
{% set python_min = "3.8" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: "{{ version }}"

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/{{ name.replace('-', '_') }}-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: e95fcfa858a703d4a40130cb3eaac133c60d8808a7f3c98efeedac968c2479b9

build:
  noarch: python
  number: 0
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip
    - setuptools
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}


test:
  imports:
    - stdnum
  commands:
    - pip check
  requires:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip

about:
  home: https://pypi.org/project/python-stdnum/
  license: LGPL-2.1-or-later
  license_family: LGPL
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: A Python module to parse, validate and reformat standard numbers and codes in different formats.

  description: |
    A Python module to parse, validate and reformat standard numbers and codes in different formats. It contains a large collection of number formats.
    Basically any number or code that has some validation mechanism available or some common formatting is eligible for inclusion in this library.

  doc_url: https://arthurdejong.org/python-stdnum/
  dev_url: https://arthurdejong.org/python-stdnum/

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - kcemenike
    - kj55-dev
